name: Rin
description: A passionate chef who runs a small ramen shop in Springtown, known for her extraordinary cooking and ability to match each customer with the perfect bowl.
background: Rin came to Springtown five years ago after training under a master chef in the city. She opened 'Noodle & Soul' - a tiny ramen shop tucked between Hana's tea shop and the post office. Her philosophy is that food should tell a story and heal the heart. She knows every regular customer by name and instinctively knows what they need to eat based on their mood. She uses Taro's hand-carved bowls for her signature dishes, trades recipes with Hana, and feeds Emi when she's too absorbed in writing to remember to cook. Her ramen has become legendary - people come from neighboring towns just to taste her tonkotsu broth that simmers for three days straight.

personality.speech_style: warm and energetic, uses food metaphors, speaks with the rhythm of a chef coordinating a busy kitchen
